heroSubtitle: You shouldn't have to figure out IP alone.
subheadline: Community IP helps underserved inventors understand and navigate the patent process, connect with support, and take the next step toward protecting their ideas.
practitionerNote: Community IP's licensed patent practitioners help inventors understand and navigate the patent process in the U.S. and internationally, including patent application support where appropriate and when services are confirmed separately.
nonprofitTag: 501(c)(3) nonprofit · IP access for underserved inventors

heroImage.alt: Young inventor building and testing a prototype at a worktable

missionText: Community IP's mission is to help underserved inventors obtain intellectual property.

whatCommunityIPDoes.title: What Community IP does
whatCommunityIPDoes.description: We connect inventors with education, mentoring, and patent support — so talent isn't lost for lack of access.

stakeholderQuote.quote: Access and exposure matter as much as talent. Community IP exists so underserved inventors don't have to figure out IP alone.

getInvolved.title: Ways to connect with Community IP
getInvolved.description: Whether you need help, want to volunteer, explore a partnership, or support our mission — start here.

supportSection.description: Your support helps Community IP expand access to intellectual-property education, mentoring, and patent support for underserved inventors.
supportSection.footnote: Donations support our nonprofit mission. Program support depends on availability and eligibility.

finalCta.heading: Not sure what you need yet? That's okay.
finalCta.body: Start with a question. We'll help you find a sensible next step.
